text.title: Result and Option Combinators
text.summary: Functional combinators for transforming and chaining Result and Option without explicit match blocks.

rule.statement: Use Iterator::collect::<Result<Vec<T>, E>>() to fail on the first error when processing a list of fallible operations sequentially. Use join_all + collect for concurrent async.
rule.rationale: Collecting into Result short-circuits at the first Err, which is usually the desired behaviour. filter_map(|r| r.ok()) silently discards errors — use it only when partial success is intentional.
